_meta.doc: Registry of named collision effects. Keys map StringName ids that abilities reference via the `collision_effect` field. Each entry is consumed by FxDirector at runtime.

fields.shader: Absolute res:// path to the .gdshader file. Required.
fields.kind: 'body' = render on victim's Body Sprite2D. 'hex' = render on a quad placed at hex world position (used for summon-style effects). Body kind requires victims; hex kind requires create_hexes.
fields.duration_ms: Total tween duration. progress uniform goes 0→1 across this span.
fields.uses_direction: If true, FxDirector sets the 'angle' uniform per victim from caster→victim vector (radians). Used by swipe-style shaders.
fields.uniforms: Dict of shader_parameter name → value. Arrays of length 4 become Color, length 3 Vector3, length 2 Vector2, scalars stay scalar.

_meta.edit_freely: Tweak colors, widths, durations here without touching code. Adding a new effect = put a new entry + ship its .gdshader, then reference the key from skill JSONs.
